texto: To devise an information processing system capable of getting along on its own - it must handle its own problems of programming, bookkeeping, communication and coordination with its users. It must appear to its users as a single, integrated personality.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Cliff Shaw sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “To devise an information processing system capable of getting along on its own - it must handle i…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, personality, problems, útil em momentos de problems.
